text: I feel a sense of anticipation with a touch of disorientation here. The modern, stark architecture makes me aware of the boundaries between spaces, both physical and conceptual. Encountering the vibrant R+D display, I am drawn to the intersection of technology and human creativity. The presence of text and screens reflecting on perception and reality evokes a thoughtful curiosity in me. I feel like I am in a place between inquiry and discovery, where the unfamiliar is an invitation to reflect on how we adapt, innovate, and exist within spaces engineered for both safety and imagination.
